overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside an NCART metro train in Cyberpunk 2077, departing a station platform and traveling through an elevated urban track system. The journey passes through a hazy cyberpunk cityscape with neon signage and brutalist architecture before arriving at the next station.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART metro station platform with neon signage

events.description: train begins to accelerate and depart from the station platform

agents.ego_description: seated inside the metro train waiting for departure, then beginning to move

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the platform waiting for the train to depart

entered.detail: illuminated NCART metro sign with cyan neon lettering above the platform
concrete station platform with yellow safety lines

green metal window frame of the train interior

segments.scene_description: The segment begins stationary at an NCART metro station platform. The cyan neon station sign is visible through the window while pedestrians walk along the platform. Around 8 seconds, the train begins to accelerate, and the platform starts receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track cutting through dense urban canyon

events.description: automated announcement indicates the next stop is Glen North
train passes from open elevated track into a more enclosed industrial structure

agents.ego_description: traveling at speed through the cyberpunk cityscape observing the urban architecture

entered.detail: rusted steel support girders of the elevated metro track
tall brutalist and glass buildings characteristic of Night City architecture
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated track structure

segments.scene_description: The train travels at speed along elevated tracks through a dense cyberpunk urban environment. Brutalist skyscrapers and industrial support structures pass by the windows while the interior metro map glows steadily. An automated announcement indicates the approaching Glen North station as the train moves through varying industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching NCART station platform with neon signage

events.description: train begins to decelerate as it approaches the station platform
announcement mentions arrival at Ebunike station

agents.ego_description: slowing down and preparing to arrive at the destination station

entered.detail: concrete platform edge becoming visible as the train slows
red and cyan neon signage illuminating the approaching station
covered station canopy with industrial metal roofing

segments.scene_description: The train decelerates as it approaches the next NCART station. The platform edge and station canopy come into view, replacing the open cityscape. Neon signage becomes visible through the haze as the train prepares to stop, with automated announcements indicating the arrival at Ebunike.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a metro train as it departs one neon-lit station and travels through a dense urban sprawl toward another. It begins stationary at an NCART platform where cyan signage and pedestrians are visible through the window, before the train accelerates and the platform recedes into the distance. As the train gains speed, the view shifts to a blur of brutalist skyscrapers and industrial support structures passing by the windows while a glowing interior map remains steady. The scene then transitions from the open cityscape to the approaching architecture of the next stop, with the platform edge and station canopy gradually replacing the industrial horizon. Finally, the train decelerates through a haze of neon signage as it comes to a halt at the Ebunike station.
